note: Flow Designer flows are visual and stored as internal flow/action records, not flat JS. This file is a build blueprint: recreate these steps in Flow Designer exactly as listed.

steps.details: Map catalog variables to table fields as defined in catalog_items/offboarding_catalog_item.json. Set state = New.

steps.action: Flow Logic: AutoAssignTasks business rule fires on insert
steps.details: Creates IT/Facilities/Security tasks with offboarding-specific checklist text (disable accounts, recover badge, revoke access).
IF last_working_date is within 2 business days of today THEN escalate priority of all 3 tasks to 'High' and notify department managers immediately.
Send 'Offboarding Initiated' notification to Security group first (access revocation is time-critical), then IT and Facilities.
Send 'Offboarding Complete' confirmation to HR Operations and the manager, confirming all access is revoked and assets recovered.
Close the originating catalog request item (RITM) as Closed Complete.
